---
title: "Supplementary 1"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

source("knitr.R")
source("theme.R")
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source("data.R")
```

# Leiden v Louvain ARIs

```{r ari-leiden-vs-louvain, fig.height=4.5, fig.width=6}
lims <- range(
  c(metrics_new$agree_ari_louvain, metrics_new$agree_ari_leiden),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

p_ari_leiden_vs_louvain <- ggplot(
  metrics_new, aes(
    x = agree_ari_louvain, y = agree_ari_leiden,
    color = method, shape = dataset
  )
) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.2) +
  coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims) +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "Dataset", limits = dataset_levels) +
  labs(
    x = "**Louvain** ARI",
    y = "**Leiden** ARI",
    color = "Method",
    shape = "Dataset"
  )

p_ari_leiden_vs_louvain
```

```{r paired-differences-leiden-minus-louvain, fig.height=5, fig.width=6}
paired_diff_df <- metrics_new %>%
  mutate(diff_ari = agree_ari_leiden - agree_ari_louvain) %>%
  select(method, dataset, diff_ari)

p_ari_diff <- ggplot(
  paired_diff_df, aes(x = method, y = diff_ari)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = method, shape = dataset),
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.4, dodge.width = 1.0),
    alpha = 0.55, size = 1.1
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(group = interaction(method, dataset), fill = method, color = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.0),
    width = 0.8, alpha = 0.2, outlier.shape = NA
  ) +
  scale_color_method(guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_method(guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Method", y = "ARI<sub>Leiden</sub> - ARI<sub>Louvain</sub>",
    color = "Method", shape = NULL
  )

p_ari_diff
```

# Patchwork

```{r supp1, fig.height=8.85, fig.width=6.6}
p_main_panels <- (
  p_ari_leiden_vs_louvain / (p_ari_diff + guides(shape = "none"))
) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

p_main_panels
```
